message:
feat(beads): Add two-tier progressive search refinement (bd-3az0)

New feature bead for hybrid search architecture:
- Instant results via Model2Vec (potion-multilingual-128M, ~1ms)
- Background refinement via warm daemon (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, ~130ms)
- Smooth re-rank animation as results settle
- Graceful fallback if daemon unavailable

Depends on bd-31z (Warm Model Daemon Architecture).
Child of bd-wyw (Embedding Bake-off Epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
